strings.splash_desc: Find the nearest public drinking fountain, from the official City of Madrid data.
strings.privacy1: Your location is only used to frame the map; it is never sent or stored anywhere.
strings.privacy2: Your favourite fountains are saved locally in your browser.
strings.report_link: Report a broken fountain to the City Council
strings.outside_text: No fountains found nearby. Looks like you're not in Madrid, or there's a problem with the database.
strings.visit_many: You've visited it {n} times, last on
strings.empty_text: No results with these filters. Try removing one.
strings.about_desc: Official data from the City of Madrid (CC BY 4.0).
strings.set_estela_on: Show the trail of your movement
strings.set_datos_hint: To move your settings to another phone or browser.
strings.footer: Made by Ivan with ❤️ and lots of AI
strings.err_denied: Permission denied. Enable it in your browser settings to see nearby fountains.
strings.err_locate: We couldn't get your location. Try again.
strings.err_load: Couldn't load the fountains. Reload the page and try again.
strings.ar_steps: The fountain is a few steps away
strings.ar_cal: Move your phone in a figure 8 to calibrate the compass
strings.ar_lift: Lift your phone to see the fountain
strings.ar_follow: Follow the icon or the arrow
strings.ar_cam_no: Your browser can't use the camera for AR.
strings.ar_cam_err: Couldn't open the camera. Check permissions.
strings.ar_perm: I need orientation permission for the compass.
strings.far_text: This app only shows fountains in Madrid
